definitions.text: Visual perception. The act of seeing or looking at something.
examples: He changed seats to get a complete view of the stage.
If there are any rabbits in this park, they keep carefully out of our view.

definitions.text: The act of seeing or looking at something.
examples: He changed seats to get a complete view of the stage.
If there are any rabbits in this park, they keep carefully out of our view.
The video was viewed by millions of people.

definitions.text: To regard in a stated way.
examples: I view it as a serious breach of trust.
